name: Fang Prime
description: A set of ceremonial daggers from the Orokin era, the Fang Prime's blades resonate violently as they strike. This allows them to pierce hardened materials like armor with ease.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A set of ceremonial daggers from the Orokin era, the Fang Prime's blades resonate violently as they strike. This allows them to pierce hardened materials like armor with ease.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Fang Prime and Dual Ether having the incorrect Mastery Rank requirement.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing sounds on Fang Prime / Dual Ether Dagger melee attacks.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Fang Prime has been given the PBR treatment.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed broken Fang Prime elemental FX.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for not being able to build Fang Prime or Orthos Prime in Foundry.
